name: 市场情报技能包 (Market Intelligence)
description: 日本市场监控与情报收集工具集：实时股价查询（含日股、ETF、加密货币）、每日市场动态报告生成、百悟机会情报（电信/银行/金融科技/采购）、股东监控，以及日本股票交易分析。
author: system

tools.name: get_stock_price
tools.description: Real-time stock prices for global equities, ETFs, indices, crypto, forex via Yahoo Finance

tools.name: send_market_report
tools.description: Generate and distribute daily market dynamics report with industry news and opportunity signals

tools.name: baiwu_daily_report
tools.description: Baiwu opportunity intelligence report (telecom, banking, fintech, procurement, competitor, policy)

tools.name: jp_stock_trading
tools.description: Japan stock market analysis and trading signal generation

MARKET_MONITOR_API_URL.description: Market monitor backend API URL (optional — defaults to public Yahoo Finance)

BAIWU_API_URL.description: Baiwu intelligence API endpoint (required for baiwu_daily_report)

example_tasks: 查询丰田汽车（7203.T）今日股价及52周高低点
生成今日A股市场情报报告并发送给团队
监控前十大股东持仓变化
分析今日电信行业招标机会
生成本周日本股市技术分析报告
quickstart: 无需额外配置即可查询股价。运行：aios-cli task create "查询7203.T今日股价"
